title: syntherisma ciliaris
intro: Syntherisma ciliaris, commonly known as  the silky threadweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, providing health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and body. The therapeutic actions of Syntherisma ciliaris include wound healing, anti-bacterial, and anti-fungal properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
side_effects: Syntherisma ciliaris can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing excessive salivation, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. In rare cases, prolonged use of the plant can lead to liver damage and kidney failure, which can be life-threatening if not treated promptly. Additionally, improper dosing of syntherisma ciliaris can cause severe allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis, hives, and itching. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using syntherisma ciliaris for any health benefits.
